record.field: SELECT 1 FROM res_partner_account a INNER JOIN res_partner r ON r.id = a.customer_id WHERE r.id = %s AND lower(a.category_description) = 'salary advance' ORDER BY a.opening_date DESC LIMIT 1
Analysis for customers using salary advance product
SELECT 1 FROM res_partner_account a INNER JOIN res_partner r ON r.id = a.customer_id WHERE r.id = %s AND lower(a.category_description) = 'other receivables' ORDER BY a.opening_date DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT 1 FROM res_partner_account a INNER JOIN res_partner r ON r.id = a.customer_id WHERE r.id = %s AND lower(a.category_description) = 'ijara retail provisions' ORDER BY a.opening_date DESC LIMIT 1
Analysis for customers using ijara retail provisions product
